---
name: Feature request
description: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected, and what is the gap today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you want. Be as concrete as you can (API shape, CLI flags, config keys, or workflow).

## Alternatives

What other approaches did you consider? Why might they be better or worse?

## Research relevance

How does this relate to **research, reproducibility, or responsible use** of the toolkit (e.g. safety-related analysis, disambiguation of model limits)? If it is purely ergonomic, say so.

## Additional context

Optional: references, prior art, or links to related issues or PRs.
